change_summary: Increase optical bench volume and mass due to new lens assembly

cascade_issues.title: Mass constraint violation for optical subsystem
cascade_issues.description: The increase in mass from 8.2 kg to 9.4 kg exceeds the total payload mass requirement of ≤35 kg, reducing margin.

cascade_issues.title: Potential impact on structural subsystem mass budget
cascade_issues.description: The additional 1.2 kg in the optical subsystem may require adjustments to the structure subsystem's mass allocation, potentially affecting its compliance with the total payload mass requirement.

cascade_issues.title: Potential impact on thermal subsystem volume and heat dissipation
cascade_issues.description: The increase in optical bench volume may affect the thermal subsystem's ability to manage heat dissipation within the reduced volume envelope, potentially impacting ΔT compliance.

cascade_issues.title: Potential impact on mechanical subsystem volume constraints
cascade_issues.description: The increase in optical bench volume may violate the platform's ICD-defined maximum volume of 0.10 m³, requiring reevaluation.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
missing_tests.reason: The new lens assembly may require additional shock testing to ensure it can withstand launch vibration and shock loads.
